title: cyperus auriculatus
intro: Cyperus auriculatus, also known as earhead flatsedge or golden flatsedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus auriculatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to utilize its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
